subcodes.first_line: O luminous leaf and fruit of My divine Lote-Tree! Grieve thou not over the hardships of this world; nay, rather, rejoice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایتها الورقه النورآء و ثمره سدرتی المنتهی لاتحزنی عن مکاره الدنیا ان افرحی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
